name: debt-projection-tool-v2
description: Debt Projection Tool — Version 2. Same methodology as v1 (FT-2014-replica), but with the latest IMF WEO data (April 2026) and the full WEO universe (189 economies, 172 fully projectable). Baseline line is WEO's own published debt-to-GDP path; user's projection diverges from sliders.
